---
description: How to terminate your agreement containing Microsoft 365 subscriptions.
---

# Terminate Microsoft 365 agreement

This tutorial explains how to terminate a Marketplace agreement by submitting a termination order.

When you terminate an agreement, all subscriptions associated with that agreement are also terminated.

### Prerequisites <a href="#howtodownsizeamicrosoft365subscriptionlicense-prerequisites" id="howtodownsizeamicrosoft365subscriptionlicense-prerequisites"></a>

Ensure that the agreement you want to terminate is active. Agreements in any other state cannot be terminated.

### Terminate Microsoft 365 agreement

{% stepper %}
{% step %}
**Open the agreement to terminate**

To open the agreement:

1. Go to **Marketplace** > **Agreements**.
2. Select the agreement to terminate.
3. On the agreement details page, select the dropdown arrow <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="<svg xmlns=&#x22;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#x22; height=&#x22;24px&#x22; viewBox=&#x22;0 -960 960 960&#x22; width=&#x22;24px&#x22; fill=&#x22;#5f6368&#x22;><path d=&#x22;M480-344 240-584l56-56 184 184 184-184 56 56-240 240Z&#x22;/></svg>" data-size="line">, then select **Terminate.**
{% endstep %}

{% step %}
**Submit the termination order**

In the guided **Terminate agreement** flow, complete the following steps:

1. **Items** – Verify that the new quantity of all subscriptions is set to as `0` and select **Next**.
2. **Order details** – Add any reference details or comments, then select **Next**.
3. **Review order** – Review the order details, then select **Place order**.&#x20;
4. **Summary** – Select **View order** to open the order details page or select **Close**.
{% endstep %}
{% endstepper %}

### Next steps <a href="#next-steps" id="next-steps"></a>

A termination order is created for the agreement and submitted to the vendor for processing.&#x20;

While the order is being processed, the agreement status changes from **Active** to **Updating**. During this time, you cannot submit additional orders for the agreement.

When processing is complete, the agreement status changes to **Terminated**. All subscriptions associated with the agreement are also terminated.
